title: ASR Outdoor Bike Safety Flashlight and Red LED Flasher 2pc
description:
Ever find yourself riding your bike at night and worrying about your visibility? This ASR Outdoor 3 LED Safety Tail Light Flasher and Bicycle Flashlight Mount will ensure that you'll be seen by other bikers and vehicles. This bike safety set features a tail light flasher with 3 super bright red LED bulbs to ensure your visibility on the road, and a bicycle flashlight with a rotating mount to light up dark routes. Compact and lightweight, this bike safety light set is ideal for your daily commute, serious cyclists, and even kids! Make sure to keep one of these on your bike at all times.
